title: feat: add VS Code extension for Project Hunch visualization
context:
- Implemented a read-only visualizer for the Engineering Memory OS in VS Code.
- Added features including an activity-bar tree, context briefs, and a status bar invariant counter.
- Created a self-contained read layer over the committed .hunch/ JSON source.
- Developed a tree view to display invariants, decisions, bugs, fragile symbols, and components.
- Integrated commands for refreshing the view and displaying context for the active file.
- Implemented live refresh functionality when .hunch/ c
